title: Better Than Wolves Survival Rebirth (BTWSR)
description: As close to better than wolves as possible in modern Minecraft
body:
#   how to use the campfire 
### 1. you will need a campfire, one stick, a fire starter, fuel, and raw meat.
### 2. place that campfire and click on it with a stick 
### 3. click on the campfire with your meat to put it on 
### 4. click and hold on the campfire while holding a fire starter until it lights 
### 5. When the flame is small, use fuel (bark, sticks, sawdust) to get it to medium flame
### 6. if the flame is too big it will burn your food 
### 7. if the flame is too small, the fire might go out

**For the closest to better than wolves experience switch the world type to moderner beta and enable golden days resourse pack.** 

If you find any bugs, please report them in [Better than wolves rebirth discord ](https://discord.gg/EtXx6pFuG) or in [The BTWR Reddit page](https://www.reddit.com/r/BTWRebirthModpack/comments/1py4q26/bugs_and_issues_for_btwr/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=web3x&utm_name=web3xcss&utm_term=1&utm_content=share_button)

Better Than Wolves is Minecrafts Hardest mod, and can somtimes even be quite fun. The only problem with B.T.W. is that its made for ancient minecraft versions and can be hard to download. Thats why I made this Modpack, so everyone can expierience the fun of Better Than Wolves on modern Minecraft versions.

This Modpack adds many more steps to Minecraft. Hunger is overhauled and decreases way faster. To survive your first few days punch wood to slowly get planks, sticks, and bark. using sticks you can make a campfire to cook food.
This modpack is very close to B.T.W. but not a complete clone. If you are stuck you can try to use the wiki: [Better Than Wolves wiki](https://wiki.btwce.com/index.php?title=Main_Page) but I warn you, many mechanics may be different.
